2374200.name: Essential Power - Wallpapers
2374200.description:
Essential Power - High-quality wallpapers pack.

Features:
- 1080p and 2160p images,
- over 30 images in total.

Once you have purchased this DLC, you can access it as follows:

1. Click "Manage my DLC" in the DLC block on the game page in the Steam client.
2. Check the "Install" box next to the DLC titled "Essential Power - Wallpapers"
3. After that, the DLC will be downloaded to your games folder that you set up for Steam. The folder with images is called "essential_power_wp"

Note: The default path to this folder might be: "C:\Program Files (x86)\Steam\steamapps\common\Essential Power"
